ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (Male/Female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient (e.g., Asian, African American) */,
  "income" REAL /* Income level of the patient */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the patient registered with the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical condition entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the patient */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition (e.g., Hypertension, Diabetes) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the condition was diagnosed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the condition (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the medical condition */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the medical condition (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_factors" (
  "lifestyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the patient */,
  "exercise_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of exercise (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "diet_type" TEXT /* Type of diet followed (e.g., vegetarian, non-vegetarian) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption habits (e.g., none, moderate, heavy) */,
  "sleep_quality" TEXT /* Quality of sleep (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "stress_level" TEXT /* Stress level (e.g., low, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestyle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_factors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health outcome entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the patient */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of health outcome (e.g., blood pressure, weight) */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome_value" REAL /* Value of the health outcome */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the health outcome (e.g., mmHg, kg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ZIP code entry */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the patient */,
  "city" TEXT /* City associated with the ZIP code */,
  "state" TEXT /* State associated with the ZIP code */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the area corresponding to the ZIP code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare provider (e.g., doctor, nurse) */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the healthcare provider (e.g., cardiology, pediatrics) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the healthcare provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_provider" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-provider relationship */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the healthcare provider */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., primary care physician, specialist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_provider_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_provider_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of taking the medication */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was prescribed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)
